params.underlyingPool: The address of the underlying protocol pool (e.g., Aave Pool).
params.underlyingToken: The address of the asset (e.g., USDC).

returns.indexPrice: The calculated index price (e.g., 5% -> 5e18 if K=100).

getIndexPrice(address,address).notice: Returns the current Index Price (P = K * r) in 18 decimals (WAD).
